vide
A label displaying the name of a network. The argument is the name of the network.
A menu item that opens the about panel.
A button to add a new item.
Title of an alert when the user doesn't have admin rights.
A label for the administrator group.

trans-unit.id: Agent not installed. Please install the agent first.
trans-unit.source: Agent not installed. Please install the agent first.
trans-unit.target: Agent not installed. Please install the agent first.
trans-unit.note: Text displayed in a label view when the agent is not installed.
Title of an alert dialog when an error occurs.
A label for the application settings tab.
A description of an error that might occur when executing a command with elevated privileges.
A description of an error that might occur when requesting admin authorization.
A toggle that enables or disables the autostart feature.
Error message when the build process fails.
A section for the CPU and memory settings of a virtual machine.
A section of the wizard for selecting the CPU count, memory size, and disk size.
Title of the CPU & Ram step in the wizard.
A label for the number of CPU cores.
A label displayed above a dropdown menu that lets the user select the cache mode of a disk attachment.
Error message when the path to the Caked bundle is missing.
Error message when the Caked executable is missing.
A button to cancel the current action.
Title of an alert when the user cancels the creation of a virtual machine.
Title of the alert when the certificates installation fails.
A button that opens a font panel to change the terminal font.
A button that checks for updates when pressed.
Title of the OS selection step in the wizard.
Title of the category for cloud images.
A label for a color picker.
Text displayed in a label view when connecting to a VNC.
A menu that allows the user to control the virtual machine.
A button that creates a new network.
A window title for the new document wizard.
A button that creates a new virtual machine.
Error message when deleting a virtual machine fails.
The label of a button that shows the detail of a selected item
A section for sharing directories between the host and the guest.
Title of a wizard item for configuring the disk settings of a virtual machine.
A label for the path to the disk image.
A label for the disk path.
A label displayed in a row with a stepper.
A section for the disks attached to a virtual machine.
A
A toggle that enables dynamic port forwarding.
A toggle to enable or disable VM screenshoting.
A heading for a sidebar.
Error message displayed when creating a template fails.
Error message when the VM URL is invalid.

A button that opens a font panel to change the font of the terminal.
A label for the guest group ID.
A label for the user ID to use when mounting a folder.
A description of a template.
A label displayed in the detail view of a template.
A description of a view that displays a virtual machine.
A label displayed in the default case of a switch statement.

A window that displays the user's home screen.
A button that installs the agent.
A button that installs a system service for Caker.
Text displayed when the agent is being installed.
Error message when the VM URL is not a file URL.
Error message when an unexpected error occurs while creating a virtual machine.

A checkbox that allows the user to enable nested virtualization.

A section for configuring the network attachements of a virtual machine.
Title of the category for the list of networks.
A section for creating a new disk attachment.

A section for creating a new network attachment.

A section for creating a new socket endpoint.
A button that opens a dialog to create a new virtual machine.
A button to advance to the next step.

A message displayed when there are no virtual machines available.
A button that opens a new virtual machine.
A menu with options.
A button that adds something.
Title of a wizard item for configuring the ports of the virtual machine.
A button to go back.
A button that quits the application.
A toggle that allows or disables writing to the disk.
A checkbox that allows the user to enable the refitting of the display.
A button that removes the Caked service.

A toggle to enable SSH access without a password.

A checkbox to select an item.

Status of a virtual machine when it is in an error state.

Text displayed in a VNC view when the VNC connection is not established.

Text displayed when the virtual machine

A label for the list of sockets that can be created in a virtual machine.

trans-unit.target: unable to create socket with exit code %@
